subject: [PATCH v3 10/20] zonefs: convert iomap ops to ->iomap_next()

reviews.author: Damien Le Moal
reviews.summary: Acknowledged the patch without raising any concerns or suggestions.

2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch converts the iomap operations in zonefs to use the new ->iomap_next() callback, which is generated by a macro that wraps the iomap_iter_next() helper.
